title: Zs Bedwars Pack
description: “A smooth BedWars & PvP resource pack designed for better FPS, clear visuals, and competitive gameplay.”
body:
This resource pack is designed for players who want a clean, smooth, and competitive PvP experience. Perfect for BedWars, SkyWars, and other PvP game modes, it focuses on clarity, visibility, and performance.

All textures are optimized to reduce visual clutter, making enemies, blocks, and items easier to see during fast-paced fights. The pack is lightweight, helping improve FPS on both low-end and high-end PCs.

✨ Features

Clean and simple PvP-style textures

Optimized for BedWars & competitive gameplay

Better visibility in fights

Lightweight for smoother performance

Minimal distractions, maximum focus

🎮 Recommended For

BedWars

SkyWars

Duels

Practice PvP servers
